title: Skill India: Drone Delivery Fleet Maintenance Tech
stipend_or_benefits: Propeller torque wrench + Lipo safe bag.
description: Prepares riders for the incoming wave of automated delivery. Instead of riding bikes, workers learn to manage, repair, and rapidly swap payload batteries for commercial drone delivery fleets running last-mile medical and e-commerce drops.
searchable_text: delivery, drone maintenance, uav, fleet tech, drone delivery, aero logistics, brushless motor, lipo battery.

title: UPSDM: Sewer Robotics & Hydro-Jetting Operator
description: Erradicates dangerous manual scavenging. Upgrades plumbers to operate 4000-PSI hydro-jetting trucks and steer remote-controlled crawler cameras to blast through massive municipal sewer blockages without entering the pipes.
syllabus: Steering CCTV Crawler Robots in Pipes
searchable_text: plumber, hydro jetting, sewer camera, robotics, pipe clearing, municipal plumbing, drain cleaning, high pressure.

title: PMKVY: Wind Turbine Nacelle Electrical Tech
description: An extreme altitude, high-paying electrical gig. Teaches workers to climb 300-foot wind turbines to service the massive generators, yaw motors, and pitch control systems housed inside the nacelle.
searchable_text: electrician, wind turbine, renewable energy, nacelle, high voltage, generator maintenance, wind farm, extreme altitude.

title: DDU-GKY: Heavy Canvas & Tensile Structure Tailor
description: Moves tailors into outdoor architecture. Workers learn to cut and heat-weld heavy PVC canvas to create massive commercial awnings, wedding tents, and architectural tensile shade structures for stadiums and parks.
searchable_text: tailor, tensile structure, canvas, awning, pvc welding, heavy stitching, outdoor shade, commercial tent.

title: NYKS: TSCM Bug Sweeping & Cyber-Physical Security
description: An elite corporate security niche. Trains guards to execute Technical Surveillance Counter-Measures (TSCM). They learn to use RF scanners and thermal cameras to detect hidden microphones and spy cameras in executive boardrooms and VIP estates.
syllabus: Detecting Covert Lenses with Laser Scanners
Thermal Sweeping for Hidden Power Supplies
searchable_text: security, bug sweeping, tscm, surveillance detection, corporate security, executive protection, rf scanner, hidden camera.

title: Skill India: Commercial Ice Machine & Blast Freezer Tech
description: A highly specialized subset of commercial HVAC. Focuses entirely on repairing 1000lb+ flaker ice machines for fisheries and blast freezers for five-star hotel kitchens, requiring complex water-valve and refrigerant synchronization.
searchable_text: ac repair, ice machine, blast freezer, commercial refrigeration, hospitality hvac, flaker, harvest cycle, hotel kitchen.

title: UPSDM: Seismic Retrofitting & Carbon Fiber Wrapping
description: Upgrades masons to structural saviors. Teaches the advanced application of Carbon Fiber Reinforced Polymer (CFRP) wraps around aging concrete pillars and beams to drastically increase earthquake resistance without rebuilding.
syllabus: Wrapping CFRP Sheets on Load-Bearing Pillars
searchable_text: masonry, seismic retrofit, carbon fiber, cfrp, structural strengthening, earthquake resistance, epoxy wrap, concrete repair.

title: PMKVY: Dry-Dock Ship Hull & Anti-Fouling Painter
description: Moves painters from houses to massive inland waterway cargo barges. Teaches high-pressure sandblasting to remove rust, and the safe application of toxic, anti-fouling copper paints to prevent barnacle growth below the waterline.
searchable_text: painters, marine paint, anti fouling, ship hull, sandblasting, barge painting, rust removal, dry dock.

title: Skill India: Ecological Restoration & Wetland Landscaper
description: Takes landscaping into large-scale environmental conservation. Teaches workers to reconstruct damaged riverbanks and urban wetlands using native aquatic plants, bio-swales, and natural erosion control netting.
searchable_text: gardening, ecological restoration, wetland, bio swale, aquatic plants, erosion control, conservation landscaping, native plants.

title: DDU-GKY: Medical Cranial Prosthetics & Wig Maker
stipend_or_benefits: Ventilating needle set + Lace foundation kit.
description: A highly empathetic, high-paying niche. Transitions beauticians into creating custom-fitted, hand-tied medical wigs for alopecia and chemotherapy patients using breathable Swiss lace and real human hair.

searchable_text: beauty & salon, wig making, cranial prosthetics, alopecia, chemotherapy hair, lace front, ventilating needle, medical wig.

title: UPSDM: Hyperbaric & Underwater Wet Welding
stipend_or_benefits: Underwater stinger toolkit + Dive suit grant.
description: The most extreme, highest-paying welding gig available. Teaches certified divers to execute Stick (SMAW) welding completely submerged in water to repair bridge pylons, dam gates, and sunken barge hulls along the Ganga.
syllabus: Underwater Arc Physics & Gas Bubble Management
searchable_text: welding, underwater welding, hyperbaric, wet welding, bridge repair, commercial diving, marine welding, extreme gig.

title: PMKVY: Medical Lab Centrifuge & Autoclave Tech
description: Moves appliance repairers into the lucrative biotech maintenance sector. Trains mechanics to repair high-speed blood centrifuges, sterilizing autoclaves, and medical incubators for diagnostic labs and hospitals.

title: Skill India: Heritage Stone & Monument Restoration Cleaner
description: Transforms commercial cleaners into delicate restoration artisans. Teaches the use of low-pressure steam, poultices, and micro-abrasives to safely remove centuries of pollution and biological growth from historical monuments and delicate sandstone.
syllabus: Applying Chemical Poultices for Deep Stains

title: NYKS: Humane Avian Control & Bird Netting Tech
provider: National Institute of Plant Health Management
description: A highly demanded, chemical-free B2B pest control gig. Trains workers in high-altitude rigging to install invisible nylon bird netting, stainless steel spikes, and ultrasonic deterrents to protect warehouses and luxury apartments from pigeon droppings.

title: UPSDM: Athletic Track & Polyurethane Pouring Tech
